productDisplayName: Fila Men's Roller Black Silver Shoe
description: fila brings to you Roller, the perfect mix of performance and sleek design. The herringbone pattern on the forefoot offers great grip, while the sleek uppers enhance the cool factor. Team these with jeans and t-shirts for casual outings.Upper Synthetic leather upper in a snakeskin patent leather look with metallic overlays for a sleek appearance Perforated toe upper for greater breathability Central lacing system for a snug, customized Fit Heavily padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Brand name embossed on the side, tongue and behind collar Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfort Cushioned midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Made of durable rubber in herringbone pattern on the forefoot and circular embedded lugs on the heel for great traction Built up toe counter and heel counter for greater protection to the feet shoe careDo not machine washWipe with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from sunlight
